overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a Japanese farmstead village during a vibrant golden hour sunset. The character passes through a large wooden torii gate and explores traditional wooden farmhouses with smoke rising in the distance.

events.description: character walks through the large wooden torii gate entering Kuta Farmstead

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along a dirt path beside a stream toward the village entrance

entered.detail: large wooden shrine gate silhouetted against the sunset
narrow waterway running parallel to the dirt path with reflective surface
wooden Japanese farmhouse with thatched roof in the distance
tall wooden observation tower visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai walking along a coastal dirt path during a vibrant sunset. Pink clouds streak across the sky as the character approaches a large wooden torii gate that marks the entrance to the farmstead. A stream runs parallel to the path on the right, reflecting the golden light.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead entrance with wooden cart and storage buildings

events.description: sun moves behind buildings creating darker shadows and reducing backlighting

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through the village center, passing a wooden cart and approaching farm buildings

entered.detail: traditional wooden cart with large spoked wheels parked beside the path
wooden farmhouse with smoke rising from the roof indicating a fire inside
leafless tree trunk standing near the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the torii gate, the character enters the farmstead proper and walks past a wooden cart on the right. The lighting shifts as the sun drops behind the buildings, casting longer shadows across the dirt path. Smoke rises from a farmhouse ahead, and the watchtower is now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead interior with storage buildings and NPC activity

events.description: villagers become visible working near the farm buildings

agents.ego_description: character walks deeper into the farmstead, passing villagers and examining the wooden structures

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the ground near hay bales
villager standing and observing near the farmhouse entrance

entered.detail: two-story wooden farmhouse with a ladder leaning against the roof
stacks of wrapped hay bales piled beside the farmhouse
large cylindrical hay bales stacked on a wooden cart

segments.scene_description: The character explores deeper into the farmstead where the light has faded to dusk. Passing a farmhouse with a ladder and stacks of hay bales, the character encounters villagers for the first time—one sitting near the hay and another standing by a building. The environment shows signs of agricultural activity with storage buildings and farm equipment lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal path that transitions from a vibrant sunset into the deepening shadows of a rural farmstead. It begins with a samurai walking beside a reflective stream under a sky streaked with pink clouds, moving steadily toward a large wooden torii gate. As the character passes through the gate and enters the village, the lighting shifts as the sun drops behind the buildings, casting long shadows across the dirt path past a wooden cart and a distant watchtower. The scene then deepens into the dim light of dusk, moving past rising smoke and farmhouses equipped with ladders and hay bales. Finally, the camera reveals the heart of the agricultural settlement, passing storage buildings and farm equipment to encounter villagers resting among the structures.
